risks.message: Board has limited visible fiducial strategy for assembly alignment
risks.recommendation: Add global fiducials to improve assembly registration and inspection consistency.
risks.why_it_matters: Consistent fiducial strategy helps automated assembly and optical alignment stay reliable.
risks.trigger_condition: Visible fiducial count fell below the configured assembly threshold.

fix_suggestion.fix: Add global fiducials to improve assembly registration and inspection consistency.

risks.message: Ground test-point coverage appears limited for bring-up and probing
risks.recommendation: Add at least one accessible ground test point so probing and scope reference setup are easier during bring-up.
risks.why_it_matters: Ground test points are foundational for repeatable probing, debug, and validation.
risks.trigger_condition: Visible ground test-point count fell below the configured minimum.

fix_suggestion.fix: Add at least one accessible ground test point so probing and scope reference setup are easier during bring-up.

risks.message: Critical or debug-oriented net USB_DP has no visible test point
risks.recommendation: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.
risks.why_it_matters: Critical nets that cannot be probed easily make validation, factory test, and field debug slower and more expensive.
risks.trigger_condition: A critical or debug-oriented net was identified without any visible test-point component.
risks.threshold_label: Expected at least one visible access point on critical nets

fix_suggestion.fix: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.

risks.message: Critical or debug-oriented net USB_DN has no visible test point
risks.recommendation: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.
risks.why_it_matters: Critical nets that cannot be probed easily make validation, factory test, and field debug slower and more expensive.
risks.trigger_condition: A critical or debug-oriented net was identified without any visible test-point component.
risks.threshold_label: Expected at least one visible access point on critical nets

fix_suggestion.fix: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.

risks.message: Critical or debug-oriented net CLK has no visible test point
risks.recommendation: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.
risks.why_it_matters: Critical nets that cannot be probed easily make validation, factory test, and field debug slower and more expensive.
risks.trigger_condition: A critical or debug-oriented net was identified without any visible test-point component.
risks.threshold_label: Expected at least one visible access point on critical nets

fix_suggestion.fix: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.

risks.message: Geometry-derived high-voltage spacing between pad and pad is below creepage target (0.700)
risks.recommendation: Increase the routed spacing, add slots/barriers, or rework the high-voltage region to meet creepage intent.
risks.why_it_matters: Geometry-derived region spacing is a stronger basis for high-voltage creepage review than simple pad-center distance.
risks.trigger_condition: High-voltage copper-region spacing fell below the configured geometry creepage threshold.

fix_suggestion.fix: Increase the routed spacing, add slots/barriers, or rework the high-voltage region to meet creepage intent.

risks.message: Geometry-derived high-voltage spacing between pad and pad is below creepage target (2.500)
risks.recommendation: Increase the routed spacing, add slots/barriers, or rework the high-voltage region to meet creepage intent.
risks.why_it_matters: Geometry-derived region spacing is a stronger basis for high-voltage creepage review than simple pad-center distance.
risks.trigger_condition: High-voltage copper-region spacing fell below the configured geometry creepage threshold.

fix_suggestion.fix: Increase the routed spacing, add slots/barriers, or rework the high-voltage region to meet creepage intent.

risks.message: Clock source Y1 is far from controller U1 (19.80 units)
risks.recommendation: Move the crystal or oscillator closer to the controller clock pins and keep the timing loop compact and isolated.
risks.why_it_matters: Oscillators and crystals work best when their loop to the controller is short, quiet, and physically compact.
risks.trigger_condition: A detected clock source was placed farther from the nearest likely controller than the configured timing-source distance threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Reduce path length, simplify routing, and keep critical signals on cleaner and more direct routes.

risks.message: High-speed net USB_DP has a long route with no visible series or termination resistor
risks.recommendation: Review whether this interface requires termination or series damping based on edge rate and topology.
risks.why_it_matters: Longer high-speed routes can require series damping or termination to control ringing and reflections.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-speed net exceeded the termination review length threshold without a visible resistor component.

fix_suggestion.fix: Review whether this interface requires termination or series damping based on edge rate and topology.

risks.message: High-speed net USB_DN has a long route with no visible series or termination resistor
risks.recommendation: Review whether this interface requires termination or series damping based on edge rate and topology.
risks.why_it_matters: Longer high-speed routes can require series damping or termination to control ringing and reflections.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-speed net exceeded the termination review length threshold without a visible resistor component.

fix_suggestion.fix: Review whether this interface requires termination or series damping based on edge rate and topology.

risks.message: High-current net VBUS bottlenecks through a narrow copper section
risks.recommendation: Widen the narrow neck-down, shorten the high-current route, or add parallel copper/plane support to reduce current-density and voltage-drop pressure.
risks.why_it_matters: Narrow copper in a long high-current path increases resistive loss, heating, and voltage-drop risk.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-current net used a minimum width below the configured current-density limit over a materially long route.
risks.threshold_label: Minimum high-current width 0.70 units with maximum bottleneck length 24.00 units
risks.observed_label: Observed minimum width 0.25 units over 84.02 routed units

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: U1 (mcu) has no nearby decoupling capacitor
risks.recommendation: Place a decoupling capacitor close to the device power pin and on the relevant supply net.
risks.trigger_condition: Nearest valid decoupling capacitor exceeded the configured decoupling distance threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Place a 0.1uF decoupling capacitor close to the IC power pin, ideally within the configured threshold of 4.0.

risks.message: U1 appears to lack enough local decoupling support
risks.recommendation: Add or reposition local bypass capacitors close to the device supply pins with short return paths.
risks.trigger_condition: Component power pins did not have enough nearby local decoupling capacitors within the configured local-support radius.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: Differential pair USB has a length mismatch of 33.53 units
risks.recommendation: Length-match the positive and negative pair routes more closely to reduce skew.
risks.why_it_matters: Differential pair skew can collapse timing margin and degrade signal integrity on high-speed links.
risks.trigger_condition: Differential-pair route length mismatch exceeded the configured skew threshold.

fix_suggestion.fix: Length-match the positive and negative pair routes more closely to reduce skew.

risks.message: Switching or power net VBUS forms a long exposed loop path
risks.recommendation: Tighten the converter current loop, shorten the route, and keep the return path adjacent to reduce loop area and EMI.
risks.why_it_matters: Large current loops increase magnetic field radiation and make noisy power stages harder to contain.
risks.trigger_condition: A switching or power-oriented net exceeded the configured loop-length threshold.

fix_suggestion.fix: Tighten the converter current loop, shorten the route, and keep the return path adjacent to reduce loop area and EMI.

risks.message: Fast or noisy net USB_DP changes layers without nearby return-path stitching support
risks.recommendation: Add nearby ground stitching vias or keep the route on a better contained reference path to reduce return-current disruption.
risks.short_title: Weak EMC containment across layer changes
risks.why_it_matters: Layer transitions without nearby ground stitching can force return current to spread and increase EMI.
risks.trigger_condition: A fast or noisy net exceeded the switch-trace threshold and changed layers without nearby ground-via support.

fix_suggestion.fix: Add nearby ground stitching vias or keep the route on a better contained reference path to reduce return-current disruption.

risks.message: Fast or noisy net USB_DN changes layers without nearby return-path stitching support
risks.recommendation: Add nearby ground stitching vias or keep the route on a better contained reference path to reduce return-current disruption.
risks.short_title: Weak EMC containment across layer changes
risks.why_it_matters: Layer transitions without nearby ground stitching can force return current to spread and increase EMI.
risks.trigger_condition: A fast or noisy net exceeded the switch-trace threshold and changed layers without nearby ground-via support.

fix_suggestion.fix: Add nearby ground stitching vias or keep the route on a better contained reference path to reduce return-current disruption.

risks.message: Net CLK uses a trace width below the fab-oriented limit (0.12)
risks.recommendation: Increase the trace width or confirm that the chosen board house can reliably build this geometry.
risks.why_it_matters: Very narrow traces can reduce yield margin, increase fabrication cost, or violate shop minimums.
risks.trigger_condition: Trace width fell below the configured manufacturability threshold.

explanation.impact: Reduced yield or board failure risk

fix_suggestion.fix: Review the board against fabrication limits and increase trace widths or spacing where necessary.

risks.message: Net USB_DP has a long path between J1 and U1 (84.02 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce routing distance, improve placement, or treat the net as timing-sensitive if appropriate.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Shorten the net path from 84.02 toward 25.0 or below by improving placement or route topology.

risks.message: Net USB_DN has a long path between J1 and U1 (84.02 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce routing distance, improve placement, or treat the net as timing-sensitive if appropriate.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Shorten the net path from 84.02 toward 25.0 or below by improving placement or route topology.

risks.message: J1 has ground but no visible power rail
risks.recommendation: Verify that the component is connected to the intended supply net as well as ground.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Connect the affected component to the intended power rail and verify that the configured power-net definitions match the board design.

risks.message: U1 has ground but no visible power rail
risks.recommendation: Verify that the component is connected to the intended supply net as well as ground.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Connect the affected component to the intended power rail and verify that the configured power-net definitions match the board design.

risks.message: Y1 has ground but no visible power rail
risks.recommendation: Verify that the component is connected to the intended supply net as well as ground.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Connect the affected component to the intended power rail and verify that the configured power-net definitions match the board design.

risks.message: High-current net VBUS uses a long routed path
risks.recommendation: Shorten the power path and tighten the source-to-load loop to reduce parasitic resistance and inductance.
risks.why_it_matters: Longer high-current routes add drop, loop inductance, and dynamic noise in power delivery paths.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-current net exceeded the configured maximum routed-length threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: Ground strategy looks light on stitching support for net GND (0 vias)
risks.recommendation: Add more stitching or reference vias to strengthen grounding continuity and return-current robustness.
risks.why_it_matters: Weak ground stitching can reduce return-path quality and board robustness outside ideal lab conditions.
risks.trigger_condition: Ground via count fell below the configured minimum stitching threshold for a multi-layer board.

fix_suggestion.fix: Add more stitching or reference vias to strengthen grounding continuity and return-current robustness.

risks.message: Ground net GND has limited visible connectivity (3 connections)
risks.recommendation: Review grounding strategy and ensure intended loads and returns are visibly tied into the board ground structure.
risks.why_it_matters: Insufficient ground connectivity can increase susceptibility to EMI, transient issues, and inconsistent field behavior.
risks.trigger_condition: Ground connectivity count fell below the configured reliability threshold.

fix_suggestion.fix: Review grounding strategy and ensure intended loads and returns are visibly tied into the board ground structure.

risks.message: High-voltage pad on J1:VBUS is close to J1:USB_DP
risks.recommendation: Increase conductor spacing or introduce isolation features that meet the intended voltage-class clearance target.
risks.why_it_matters: Clearance shortfalls in elevated-voltage regions can create direct insulation and safety failures.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-voltage pad-to-pad spacing fell below the configured clearance threshold.

fix_suggestion.fix: Increase conductor spacing or introduce isolation features that meet the intended voltage-class clearance target.

risks.message: Net USB_DP has a long signal path between J1 and U1 (84.02 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce path length or improve routing to lower noise and signal quality risks.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal path distance exceeded the configured path-length threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Reduce the signal path length from 84.02 to at or below 25.0 by improving placement or rerouting.

risks.message: Net USB_DN has a long signal path between J1 and U1 (84.02 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce path length or improve routing to lower noise and signal quality risks.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal path distance exceeded the configured path-length threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Reduce the signal path length from 84.02 to at or below 25.0 by improving placement or rerouting.

risks.message: Critical net USB_DP is long for a two-layer style stackup
risks.recommendation: Review whether this board class needs a stronger reference-plane strategy or a stackup with better return-path support.
risks.why_it_matters: Long critical routes on a minimal stackup are harder to keep well referenced and more sensitive to return-path problems.
risks.trigger_condition: A critical net exceeded the two-layer critical-length threshold while board copper layers stayed limited.

fix_suggestion.fix: Review whether this board class needs a stronger reference-plane strategy or a stackup with better return-path support.

risks.message: Critical net USB_DP changes layers without nearby ground-return stitching
risks.recommendation: Place ground stitching vias near sensitive transitions so return current does not need to detour around the layer change.
risks.short_title: Return-path support missing at signal transitions
risks.why_it_matters: Signal vias without nearby return stitching can break reference continuity and worsen both signal integrity and EMI.
risks.trigger_condition: Critical-net vias were found outside the configured ground-stitch support radius.

fix_suggestion.fix: Place ground stitching vias near sensitive transitions so return current does not need to detour around the layer change.

risks.message: Critical net USB_DN is long for a two-layer style stackup
risks.recommendation: Review whether this board class needs a stronger reference-plane strategy or a stackup with better return-path support.

risks.message: Net VBUS has a long total routed trace length (84.02 units)
risks.recommendation: Review routing topology and shorten critical signal traces where practical.
risks.why_it_matters: Long signal routes can worsen noise sensitivity, delay, and routing quality on important nets.
suggested_actions: Review whether this net should be treated as timing- or noise-sensitive.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal-net routed length exceeded the configured maximum signal trace threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Reduce total routed trace length from 84.02380615040002 toward or below 60.0 by tightening placement and simplifying the route.

risks.message: Net USB_DP has a long total routed trace length (84.67 units)
risks.recommendation: Review routing topology and shorten critical signal traces where practical.
risks.why_it_matters: Long signal routes can worsen noise sensitivity, delay, and routing quality on important nets.
suggested_actions: Review whether this net should be treated as timing- or noise-sensitive.

fix_suggestion.fix: Reduce total routed trace length from 84.67372197262105 toward or below 60.0 by tightening placement and simplifying the route.

risks.message: Net CLK contains a very narrow trace (0.12)
risks.recommendation: Review manufacturability limits and increase trace width if the design rules require it.
risks.why_it_matters: Very narrow traces can be harder to manufacture reliably and may reduce yield margin.
suggested_actions: Increase trace width if routing space allows.
Review whether this narrow section is intentional.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal trace width fell below the configured minimum manufacturable width threshold.

explanation.impact: Reduced yield or board failure risk

fix_suggestion.fix: Increase the narrow trace width from 0.12 to at least 0.15, subject to board-space and fabrication constraints.

risks.message: Physics estimate suggests VBUS may incur high IR drop (248.3 mV)
risks.recommendation: Reduce path length, widen copper, or split the load path so voltage drop and transient impedance come down.
risks.why_it_matters: Excess IR drop can destabilize rails under load and erode noise margin at the point of use.
risks.trigger_condition: A first-principles resistance and load estimate exceeded the configured voltage-drop limit.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: Physics estimate suggests VBUS is running high current density (171.4 A/mm²)
risks.recommendation: Increase copper cross-section or redistribute load current so the conductor stays in a safer density band.
risks.why_it_matters: High current density raises heating, drop, and long-term reliability stress in power paths.
risks.trigger_condition: A first-principles current-density estimate exceeded the configured conductor limit.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: Physics estimate suggests USB_DP is off target impedance (63.1 ohms vs 90.0 ohms)
risks.recommendation: Adjust trace geometry, reference height, or stackup assumptions to bring the line closer to its impedance target.
risks.why_it_matters: A characteristic impedance shift can create reflection, eye closure, and timing margin loss on fast nets.
risks.trigger_condition: A first-principles microstrip estimate exceeded the configured impedance tolerance.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Reduce path length, simplify routing, and keep critical signals on cleaner and more direct routes.

risks.message: Clocking and fast connectivity subsystems share board context and need timing-containment review.
risks.recommendation: Check clock-source placement, reference continuity, and keepout from high-speed connectors.
risks.why_it_matters: Weak clock containment can amplify timing sensitivity and EMI risk.

fix_suggestion.fix: Check clock-source placement, reference continuity, and keepout from high-speed connectors.

risks.message: Digital control logic is present without a clearly classified debug or test subsystem.
risks.recommendation: Confirm bring-up access through debug headers, test pads, or programming entry points.
risks.why_it_matters: Boards are harder to validate when debug access is weak or missing.

fix_suggestion.fix: Confirm bring-up access through debug headers, test pads, or programming entry points.

parser_confidence.summary: Parser confidence is 95.7 / 100 for this KiCad PCB input.

risks.message: Physics estimate suggests VBUS may incur high IR drop (248.3 mV)
risks.recommendation: Reduce path length, widen copper, or split the load path so voltage drop and transient impedance come down.
risks.why_it_matters: Excess IR drop can destabilize rails under load and erode noise margin at the point of use.
risks.trigger_condition: A first-principles resistance and load estimate exceeded the configured voltage-drop limit.

risks.message: Physics estimate suggests VBUS is running high current density (171.4 A/mm²)
risks.recommendation: Increase copper cross-section or redistribute load current so the conductor stays in a safer density band.
risks.why_it_matters: High current density raises heating, drop, and long-term reliability stress in power paths.
risks.trigger_condition: A first-principles current-density estimate exceeded the configured conductor limit.

risks.message: Physics estimate suggests USB_DP is off target impedance (63.1 ohms vs 90.0 ohms)
risks.recommendation: Adjust trace geometry, reference height, or stackup assumptions to bring the line closer to its impedance target.
risks.why_it_matters: A characteristic impedance shift can create reflection, eye closure, and timing margin loss on fast nets.
risks.trigger_condition: A first-principles microstrip estimate exceeded the configured impedance tolerance.

risks.message: Physics estimate suggests USB_DN is off target impedance (63.1 ohms vs 90.0 ohms)
risks.recommendation: Adjust trace geometry, reference height, or stackup assumptions to bring the line closer to its impedance target.
risks.why_it_matters: A characteristic impedance shift can create reflection, eye closure, and timing margin loss on fast nets.
risks.trigger_condition: A first-principles microstrip estimate exceeded the configured impedance tolerance.

risks.message: Physics estimate suggests CLK is off target impedance (73.9 ohms vs 50.0 ohms)
risks.recommendation: Adjust trace geometry, reference height, or stackup assumptions to bring the line closer to its impedance target.
risks.why_it_matters: A characteristic impedance shift can create reflection, eye closure, and timing margin loss on fast nets.
risks.trigger_condition: A first-principles microstrip estimate exceeded the configured impedance tolerance.

concerns: Two-layer stackup limits return-path containment on fast or sensitive nets.

risks.message: Board has limited visible fiducial strategy for assembly alignment
risks.recommendation: Add global fiducials to improve assembly registration and inspection consistency.
risks.why_it_matters: Consistent fiducial strategy helps automated assembly and optical alignment stay reliable.
risks.trigger_condition: Visible fiducial count fell below the configured assembly threshold.

risks.message: Ground test-point coverage appears limited for bring-up and probing
risks.recommendation: Add at least one accessible ground test point so probing and scope reference setup are easier during bring-up.
risks.why_it_matters: Ground test points are foundational for repeatable probing, debug, and validation.
risks.trigger_condition: Visible ground test-point count fell below the configured minimum.

risks.message: Critical or debug-oriented net USB_DP has no visible test point
risks.recommendation: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.
risks.why_it_matters: Critical nets that cannot be probed easily make validation, factory test, and field debug slower and more expensive.
risks.trigger_condition: A critical or debug-oriented net was identified without any visible test-point component.
risks.threshold_label: Expected at least one visible access point on critical nets

risks.recommendation: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.

risks.message: Geometry-derived high-voltage spacing between pad and pad is below creepage target (0.700)
risks.recommendation: Increase the routed spacing, add slots/barriers, or rework the high-voltage region to meet creepage intent.
risks.why_it_matters: Geometry-derived region spacing is a stronger basis for high-voltage creepage review than simple pad-center distance.
risks.trigger_condition: High-voltage copper-region spacing fell below the configured geometry creepage threshold.

risks.message: Geometry-derived high-voltage spacing between pad and pad is below creepage target (2.500)
risks.recommendation: Increase the routed spacing, add slots/barriers, or rework the high-voltage region to meet creepage intent.
risks.why_it_matters: Geometry-derived region spacing is a stronger basis for high-voltage creepage review than simple pad-center distance.
risks.trigger_condition: High-voltage copper-region spacing fell below the configured geometry creepage threshold.

risks.message: Clock source Y1 is far from controller U1 (19.80 units)
risks.recommendation: Move the crystal or oscillator closer to the controller clock pins and keep the timing loop compact and isolated.
risks.why_it_matters: Oscillators and crystals work best when their loop to the controller is short, quiet, and physically compact.
risks.trigger_condition: A detected clock source was placed farther from the nearest likely controller than the configured timing-source distance threshold.

risks.message: High-speed net USB_DP has a long route with no visible series or termination resistor
risks.recommendation: Review whether this interface requires termination or series damping based on edge rate and topology.
risks.why_it_matters: Longer high-speed routes can require series damping or termination to control ringing and reflections.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-speed net exceeded the termination review length threshold without a visible resistor component.

risks.message: High-speed net USB_DN has a long route with no visible series or termination resistor
risks.recommendation: Review whether this interface requires termination or series damping based on edge rate and topology.
risks.why_it_matters: Longer high-speed routes can require series damping or termination to control ringing and reflections.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-speed net exceeded the termination review length threshold without a visible resistor component.

risks.message: High-current net VBUS bottlenecks through a narrow copper section
risks.recommendation: Widen the narrow neck-down, shorten the high-current route, or add parallel copper/plane support to reduce current-density and voltage-drop pressure.
risks.why_it_matters: Narrow copper in a long high-current path increases resistive loss, heating, and voltage-drop risk.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-current net used a minimum width below the configured current-density limit over a materially long route.
risks.threshold_label: Minimum high-current width 0.70 units with maximum bottleneck length 24.00 units
risks.observed_label: Observed minimum width 0.25 units over 84.02 routed units

risks.message: U1 (mcu) has no nearby decoupling capacitor
risks.recommendation: Place a decoupling capacitor close to the device power pin and on the relevant supply net.
risks.trigger_condition: Nearest valid decoupling capacitor exceeded the configured decoupling distance threshold.

risks.message: U1 appears to lack enough local decoupling support
risks.recommendation: Add or reposition local bypass capacitors close to the device supply pins with short return paths.
risks.trigger_condition: Component power pins did not have enough nearby local decoupling capacitors within the configured local-support radius.

risks.message: Differential pair USB has a length mismatch of 33.53 units
risks.recommendation: Length-match the positive and negative pair routes more closely to reduce skew.
risks.why_it_matters: Differential pair skew can collapse timing margin and degrade signal integrity on high-speed links.
risks.trigger_condition: Differential-pair route length mismatch exceeded the configured skew threshold.

risks.message: Switching or power net VBUS forms a long exposed loop path
risks.recommendation: Tighten the converter current loop, shorten the route, and keep the return path adjacent to reduce loop area and EMI.
risks.why_it_matters: Large current loops increase magnetic field radiation and make noisy power stages harder to contain.
risks.trigger_condition: A switching or power-oriented net exceeded the configured loop-length threshold.

risks.message: Fast or noisy net USB_DP changes layers without nearby return-path stitching support
risks.recommendation: Add nearby ground stitching vias or keep the route on a better contained reference path to reduce return-current disruption.
risks.short_title: Weak EMC containment across layer changes
risks.why_it_matters: Layer transitions without nearby ground stitching can force return current to spread and increase EMI.
risks.trigger_condition: A fast or noisy net exceeded the switch-trace threshold and changed layers without nearby ground-via support.

risks.message: Fast or noisy net USB_DN changes layers without nearby return-path stitching support
risks.recommendation: Add nearby ground stitching vias or keep the route on a better contained reference path to reduce return-current disruption.
risks.short_title: Weak EMC containment across layer changes
risks.why_it_matters: Layer transitions without nearby ground stitching can force return current to spread and increase EMI.
risks.trigger_condition: A fast or noisy net exceeded the switch-trace threshold and changed layers without nearby ground-via support.

risks.message: Net CLK uses a trace width below the fab-oriented limit (0.12)
risks.recommendation: Increase the trace width or confirm that the chosen board house can reliably build this geometry.
risks.why_it_matters: Very narrow traces can reduce yield margin, increase fabrication cost, or violate shop minimums.
risks.trigger_condition: Trace width fell below the configured manufacturability threshold.

risks.message: Net USB_DP has a long path between J1 and U1 (84.02 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce routing distance, improve placement, or treat the net as timing-sensitive if appropriate.

risks.message: Net USB_DN has a long path between J1 and U1 (84.02 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce routing distance, improve placement, or treat the net as timing-sensitive if appropriate.

risks.message: J1 has ground but no visible power rail
risks.recommendation: Verify that the component is connected to the intended supply net as well as ground.

risks.message: U1 has ground but no visible power rail
risks.recommendation: Verify that the component is connected to the intended supply net as well as ground.

risks.message: Y1 has ground but no visible power rail
risks.recommendation: Verify that the component is connected to the intended supply net as well as ground.

risks.message: High-current net VBUS uses a long routed path
risks.recommendation: Shorten the power path and tighten the source-to-load loop to reduce parasitic resistance and inductance.
risks.why_it_matters: Longer high-current routes add drop, loop inductance, and dynamic noise in power delivery paths.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-current net exceeded the configured maximum routed-length threshold.

risks.message: Ground strategy looks light on stitching support for net GND (0 vias)
risks.recommendation: Add more stitching or reference vias to strengthen grounding continuity and return-current robustness.
risks.why_it_matters: Weak ground stitching can reduce return-path quality and board robustness outside ideal lab conditions.
risks.trigger_condition: Ground via count fell below the configured minimum stitching threshold for a multi-layer board.

risks.message: Ground net GND has limited visible connectivity (3 connections)
risks.recommendation: Review grounding strategy and ensure intended loads and returns are visibly tied into the board ground structure.
risks.why_it_matters: Insufficient ground connectivity can increase susceptibility to EMI, transient issues, and inconsistent field behavior.
risks.trigger_condition: Ground connectivity count fell below the configured reliability threshold.

risks.message: High-voltage pad on J1:VBUS is close to J1:USB_DP
risks.recommendation: Increase conductor spacing or introduce isolation features that meet the intended voltage-class clearance target.
risks.why_it_matters: Clearance shortfalls in elevated-voltage regions can create direct insulation and safety failures.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-voltage pad-to-pad spacing fell below the configured clearance threshold.

risks.message: Net USB_DP has a long signal path between J1 and U1 (84.02 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce path length or improve routing to lower noise and signal quality risks.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal path distance exceeded the configured path-length threshold.

risks.message: Net USB_DN has a long signal path between J1 and U1 (84.02 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce path length or improve routing to lower noise and signal quality risks.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal path distance exceeded the configured path-length threshold.

risks.message: Critical net USB_DP is long for a two-layer style stackup
risks.recommendation: Review whether this board class needs a stronger reference-plane strategy or a stackup with better return-path support.
risks.why_it_matters: Long critical routes on a minimal stackup are harder to keep well referenced and more sensitive to return-path problems.
risks.trigger_condition: A critical net exceeded the two-layer critical-length threshold while board copper layers stayed limited.

risks.message: Critical net USB_DP changes layers without nearby ground-return stitching
risks.recommendation: Place ground stitching vias near sensitive transitions so return current does not need to detour around the layer change.
risks.short_title: Return-path support missing at signal transitions
risks.why_it_matters: Signal vias without nearby return stitching can break reference continuity and worsen both signal integrity and EMI.
risks.trigger_condition: Critical-net vias were found outside the configured ground-stitch support radius.

risks.message: Critical net USB_DN is long for a two-layer style stackup

risks.message: Net CLK contains a very narrow trace (0.12)
risks.recommendation: Review manufacturability limits and increase trace width if the design rules require it.

interaction_risks.message: Clocking and fast connectivity subsystems share board context and need timing-containment review.
interaction_risks.recommendation: Check clock-source placement, reference continuity, and keepout from high-speed connectors.
interaction_risks.why_it_matters: Weak clock containment can amplify timing sensitivity and EMI risk.

interaction_risks.message: Digital control logic is present without a clearly classified debug or test subsystem.
interaction_risks.recommendation: Confirm bring-up access through debug headers, test pads, or programming entry points.
interaction_risks.why_it_matters: Boards are harder to validate when debug access is weak or missing.

executive_summary.headline: Board needs focused engineering review
executive_summary.summary: This board shows elevated design risk. The main risk concentration is in signal integrity. The highest-priority issue is Geometry-derived high-voltage spacing between pad and pad is below creepage target (0.700). The current design snapshot includes 3 components and 5 nets. The board is likely functional at a prototype level, but the highlighted issues should be addressed before stronger production confidence.
